description: Curated answers for high-traffic head queries. Exact (normalized) query match pins a known-best page above algorithmic results. Owned by content/business, not the ranker. Keep this list small: only the top queries where you know the single best destination.

entries.title: Paspoort aanvragen
entries.note: High-volume passport and broader travel-document intents are pinned to the passport application page.

entries.title: Identiteitskaart aanvragen
entries.note: Common ID card spellings and formats should go directly to the identity card page.

entries.title: Verhuizing doorgeven
entries.note: Moving and address-change head queries have a single known civic destination.

entries.title: Parkeervergunning aanvragen
entries.note: Parking permit variants are navigational and should land on the permit application page.
